name: vuln scanners and formatters that have no per-rule options are honestly marked per_rule_options none rather than given a fabricated option surface
command: ruby -ryaml -e 't=YAML.unsafe_load_file(ARGV[0])["tools"]; ok = t["trivy"]["per_rule_options"]=="none" && t["prettier"]["per_rule_options"]=="none" && t["gitleaks"]["per_rule_options"]=="none"; exit(ok ? 0 : 1)' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/tool-option-surfaces.yaml" && echo optionless-tools-marked 1>&2
